title: Gate Point Armistice
description:
No BeeGeeM. And someone stop me from doing all these pokemon ytpmvs gawd

Sorry for being unoriginal, but I don't feel like horribly ruining this song.

Sorry for the lack of any interesting visuals, just wanted to get this over with. And with a song like this, I'm sure these kinds of visuals are okay

Oh, also thanks for the 2k subs. I appreciate that people appreciate my vids lol
